title: Rich Gooey Russian Dum Pierogi
description: A traditional Russian dish featuring dumplings filled with a rich, creamy potato and cheese mixture, topped with a tangy sauce and served with a side of truffle oil. This recipe is dairy-free friendly and perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Combine potatoes, vegan cream cheese, thyme, and black pepper in a bowl and mix well.
Place a dumpling wrapper on a clean surface and place a tablespoon of the potato mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Fold the wrapper into a triangle and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the dumplings for 5-7 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
In a small saucepan, heat the truffle oil and vegan sour cream over low heat, whisking constantly.
Add the chopped fresh dill and whisk until combined.
Serve the cooked dumplings with the truffle sauce and a side of unsalted vegan butter.
Garnish with additional fresh dill if desired.
